tooltips.peBestFirstProduct: AI product recommendation for first outreach.
tooltips.peResearchStatus: AI research lifecycle status for sales context.
tooltips.peSourceSystem: Origin system label for imported leads.
tooltips.peSourceType: Stable high-level source category supplied by Chitu Intelligence.
tooltips.peDiscoverySource: Human-readable discovery channel or source reference.
tooltips.peSourceBatchId: Stable Chitu batch identifier for operational traceability.
tooltips.peCompanyType: Chitu business entity classification; the native Lead remains the CRM record.
tooltips.peIndustry: Industry classification supplied by Chitu Intelligence.
tooltips.peBusinessModel: Business-model classification supplied by Chitu Intelligence.
tooltips.pePriorityLevel: Operational priority derived by Chitu; this is not a CRM sales stage.
tooltips.peLastResearchedAt: Last completed Chitu research collection timestamp.
tooltips.peProposalProductFitScore: Derived from the Chitu opportunity score for human opportunity review only.
tooltips.peProposalCooperationType: Contract V1 does not provide a cooperation type; this field remains unspecified unless a later approved contract supplies one.
tooltips.peProposalSuggestedNextAction: Human-review guidance only; it creates no Opportunity, activity, or workflow.
tooltips.peProposalEligibility: True means score >= 80 and eligible for manual review. It never authorizes automatic Opportunity creation.
tooltips.peProposalAction: Always records the V1 contract safety action: NO_AUTOMATIC_OPPORTUNITY.
tooltips.peContactFormUrl: Public company contact-form endpoint when no direct email is available.
tooltips.peLinkedinUrl: Public LinkedIn company or contact profile URL.
tooltips.peLastSyncAt: Timestamp of last successful Engine sync write.
tooltips.peResearchSummary: Short sales-readable research summary from Engine.
tooltips.peKeyEvidence: Compact evidence highlights supporting the score.
tooltips.peRecommendedApproach: Suggested first-touch approach for sales follow-up.
tooltips.status: CRM-owned sales lifecycle status. Technical sync/research state stays in peSyncStatus and peResearchStatus.
tooltips.peNextActionDate: CRM-owned date for the next sales follow-up action.
tooltips.peLastContactDate: CRM-owned date of the most recent sales contact.
tooltips.peEmailStatus: Email lifecycle / execution status summary. EspoCRM does not send outreach email; values may be refreshed from Chitu lifecycle sync or Brevo execution events.
tooltips.peLastEmailDate: Timestamp of the latest email lifecycle or Brevo execution event synced to EspoCRM.
tooltips.peEmailCampaignName: Human-readable campaign reference synced from Chitu or Brevo events.
tooltips.peEmailReplyStatus: Reply/bounce state summary synced without email body content.
